name: 3-Wick Matte Textured 16oz Ceramic Candle with Wooden Wick Neroli and Ivy - Threshold™: Soy Wax Blend, 48hr Burn Time
description:
Indulge in the serene ambiance of our 3-Wick Matte Textured 16oz Ceramic Candle with Wooden Wick Neroli and Ivy from Threshold™. Infused with a refreshing and invigorating fragrance, this candle fills your space with the essence of fresh blooms and lush greenery. Crafted from ceramic with a matte, textured finish, it adds a touch of elegance to any room. Made from a soy wax blend, it provides approximately 48 hours of burn time, ensuring long-lasting enjoyment.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
